texto: It took me years to realize that I could do all kinds of drastic acts like quitting jobs, relationships, towns (or all of the above), but what showed up at the next job, relationship, & town was still ME.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Summer Pierre: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “It took me years to realize that I could do all kinds of drastic acts like quitting jobs, relatio…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, verdade, years pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
